[PATCH] devel/ocaml-lwt: Fix configure environment

Thank you!
Indeed, this small replacement was exactly what helped to solve the issue.
All is built fine now. Tested as usual, with all currently supported release branches on amd64 and i386.
Also adding LICENSE_FILE and some small linting from me (if needed).
